new_claims.claim_text: Iranian state TV is calling for children to act as human shields at power plants against President Trump.

new_claims.claim_text: Huge tanker explosion in the Panama Canal.

new_claims.claim_text: Iran threatens to deal with the infrastructure of the United States and its partners in the Persian Gulf.

new_claims.claim_text: Explosions reported on Kharg Island, Iran.
